LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT LINDA IBARRA'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED, 10 DAYS TO RESPOND. THE PROCESS SERVER DECLARATION IS CREDIBLE. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF LINDA IBARRA IS DENIED AS MOOT. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS NOT HOLDING ANY MONEY. MOREOVER, THE COURT IS UNABLE TO EVALUATE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S ASSERTION THAT HER SOCIAL SECURITY CHECK IS DIRECT DEPOSITED INTO THE LEVIED ACCOUNT. LASTLY, THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
